'''âf-h-k-t''' ('''kafahketoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cede|cede]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cede|cede]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-h-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| kafahketoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifahketoko|thifahketoko]] || [[word:jifahketoko|jifahketoko]] || [[word:shifahketoko|shifahketoko]] || [[word:kifahketoko|kifahketoko]]
|-

|-
